response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software engineering, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent development, with recent experience at re:cinq contributing to MCP and agentic workflows. However, his resume lacks explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent systems (beyond MCP), or LLM performance optimization. His AI experience is more focused on infrastructure than core GenAI components.
strengths: 8+ years of full-stack development with TypeScript and Node.js, including AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
Proven ability to design and optimize scalable systems (e.g., handled millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring) and leadership in technical workshops
concerns: No clear evidence of direct experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
Limited detail on GenAI-specific modeling, evaluation pipelines, or observability frameworks
Education is CS-focused but lacks advanced AI/ML degrees or specialized GenAI research
